a.xlink:title: Sets the data counter to zero.
Returns number of spatial dimensions configured.
Determines participant accessing this interface from the configuration.
Determines participants providing meshes to other participants.
Allows to access a registered mesh.
Returns the base ID of the mesh.
Adds a lock with a given state.
Returns the only instance (singleton) of the EventRegistry class.
Returns an owning pointer to the current CommState.
True if this process is running the master.
True if this process is running a slave.
Initializes communication between master and slaves.
Returns true, if given element is in vector, otherwise false.
returns an blank commstate representing MPI_COMM_NULL
